Combat.name: Strike to Injure
Combat.description: The warrior can land their blows with uncanny accuracy. Add +1 to all injury rolls caused by the model in hand-to-hand combat.

Combat.name: Combat Master
Combat.description: If the warrior fights against more than one enemy, they gain +1 extra Attack. Immune to 'All Alone' tests.

Combat.name: Step Aside
Combat.description: Each time the warrior suffers a wound in hand-to-hand combat, they may make an additional saving throw of 5+ (taken after armor saves).

Combat.name: Web of Steel
Combat.description: The model gains +1 to all their rolls on the Critical Hit table in hand-to-hand combat.

Rules.name: Leader
Rules.description: Any warrior within 6" may use the Leader's Leadership characteristic for tests.

Rules.name: Cause Fear
Rules.description: Enemy must pass a Leadership test to charge this model or if they are charged by it.

Rules.name: Immune to Psychology
Rules.description: Model automatically passes any Leadership tests based on psychology (Fear, Panic, etc.).

Rules.name: Immune to Poison
Rules.description: Model is not affected by poisons.

Rules.name: No Pain
Rules.description: Model ignores 'Stunned' results, treat them as 'Knocked Down' instead.

Rules.name: May not Run
Rules.description: Model may not perform a run move.

Rules.name: Fanatical
Rules.description: Model automatically passes all Leadership tests. May never be the warband leader.

Rules.name: Hard to Kill
Rules.description: Dwarfs can only be taken out of action on a roll of 6 instead of 5-6 when rolling on the Injury chart.

Rules.name: Hard Head
Rules.description: Dwarfs ignore the special rules for maces, clubs, etc. They are not easy to knock out!

Rules.name: Armour Proficiency
Rules.description: Dwarfs never suffer movement penalties for wearing armour.

Rules.name: Hate Orcs and Goblins
Rules.description: Dwarfs hate Orcs and Goblins.

Rules.name: Grudgebearers
Rules.description: A Dwarf warband may never include any kind of Elven Hired Sword or Dramatis Personae.

Rules.name: Incomparable Miners
Rules.description: When checking for wyrdstone at the end of a game, add +1 to the number of pieces found for a Dwarf warband.

Rules.name: Deathwish
Rules.description: Troll Slayers are completely immune to all psychology and never need to test if fighting alone.

Rules.name: Perfect Killer
Rules.description: Extra -1 modifier to any armour save the enemy has to take (shooting and close combat).

Rules.name: Burn the Witch!
Rules.description: Hates all models who can cast spells.

Rules.name: Charge Attack
Rules.description: +1 Attack when charging.

Rules.name: Stupidity
Rules.description: Must pass Leadership test or act randomly. Immune if hero within 6".

Rules.name: Large Target
Rules.description: +1 to hit when shooting at this model. Can be picked as target even if not closest.

Rules.name: Blessed Sight
Rules.description: Re-roll any failed characteristic tests, to hit rolls (melee/ranged). Exploration: roll 2D6 and pick one.

Rules.name: Crazed
Rules.description: Automatically pass any Leadership tests.

Rules.name: Expert Swordsmen
Rules.description: Re-roll any failed hits when charging if armed with normal swords.

Rules.name: Military Discipline
Rules.description: Fighters may use Captain's Leadership if within 12" (instead of 6").

Rules.name: Martial Training
Rules.description: All Marksmen add +1 to their Ballistic Skill.

Rules.name: Animosity
Rules.description: Roll D6 at start of turn (Henchmen). On 1, roll another D6: 1: 'I 'Erd Dat!' (Charge/shoot friend) ; 2-5: Do nothing ; 6: Move twice.

Rules.name: Not Orcs
Rules.description: Goblins/Squigs only count as half a model for Rout tests.

Rules.name: Regeneration
Rules.description: 4+ save to ignore wound. Not against fire/fire-magic.

Rules.name: Vomit Attack
Rules.description: Single S5 attack, automatically hits, ignores armour saves.

Rules.name: Always Hungry
Rules.description: Upkeep 15 gc (or sacrifice 2 Goblins/Squigs) after every game.

Rules.name: Inheritance
Rules.description: Purchase one starting item at half cost. If lost, must replace at 150% or -1 to all tests.

Rules.name: Bear Handler
Rules.description: Bear automatically passes Stupidity tests if within 6" of Tamer.

Rules.name: Gun-Rest
Rules.description: +1 to hit with handgun if model did not move (must have halberd).

Rules.name: Bear Hug
Rules.description: If 2 hits, may do Strength test (D6+S). If win/tie, automatic wound (no armor save).

Rules.name: Fiercely Loyal
Rules.description: Tamer ignores 'Sold to Pits', 'Robbed', 'Captured' injuries if bear lives.

Rules.name: Hate Chaos
Rules.description: Hates all Chaos warbands (Possessed, Beastmen, Skaven, etc.).

Rules.name: Bull Rush
Rules.description: On charge, may attempt to knock down opponent instead of attacking. +1 to hit, no wound roll.

Rules.name: Foul Odour
Rules.description: Living enemies are at -1 to hit in melee. Fire attacks against user are at +1 Strength.

Rules.name: Taunt
Rules.description: Range: LOS. Target must pass Ld test or move to engage user in next turn.

Rules.name: Animal friendship
Rules.description: Animals never attack user. Wardogs do not count against model limit.

Rules.name: Blood Oath
Rules.description: Re-roll a single Rout test once per game (Leader only).

Rules.name: Self-Sufficient
Rules.description: Cannot hire any Mercenaries except for Ogres.

Rules.name: Drunk
Rules.description: Automatically pass all Leadership tests. May never be leader.

Rules.name: Slow witted
Rules.description: Gains advances at half the normal rate (requires twice the experience).

Rules.name: Set Traps
Rules.description: A fighter may set a trap by spending a turn doing nothing else. Place a marker in base contact; when another model moves within 2", it triggers on 3+ and causes a S4 hit.

Rules.name: Promotion: If promoted to hero, may not choose Strength skills
Rules.description: A Halfling promoted to hero through 'The lad's got talent' may not choose Strength skills as one of their two skill lists.

Rules.name: Wizard
Rules.description: This fighter is a wizard and may use the spell list specified on its warband entry.

Rules.name: Drunken
Rules.description: Roll 1D6 at the start of each turn: on 1 the fighter suffers stupidity, on 2-5 nothing happens, and on 6 the fighter gains frenzy for that turn. While affected by either stupidity or frenzy, they are immune to psychology.

Rules.name: Woodland Dwelling
Rules.description: This fighter suffers no movement penalties for moving through wooded areas.

Rules.name: Trample
Rules.description: This counts as an additional attack made with hooves and sheer size; it does not benefit from weapon bonuses or penalties.

Rules.name: Lowest of the Low
Rules.description: This fighter may never acquire a position of authority. If it rolls 'That lad's got talent', the result must be re-rolled.

Rules.name: Bloodgreed
Rules.description: If this fighter puts all of its enemies out of action in hand-to-hand combat, it becomes frenzied on a D6 roll of 4+.

Rules.name: Unnatural Strength
Rules.description: This fighter starts the game with the Strongman skill from the Strength skill list in the Mordheim rulebook.

Rules.name: Nurgle's Blessings
Rules.description: This fighter must start the game with one or more Blessings of Nurgle.

Rules.name: Daemonic Aura
Rules.description: Daemons have a 5+ armour save. It is modified by Strength as normal and negated by magic weapons and spells. Their attacks are also considered magical.

Rules.name: Daemonic Instability
Rules.description: If taken out of action, this Daemon is banished and destroyed on a D6 roll of 1-3 instead of rolling for injury. If the warband routs, it must immediately pass a Leadership test or be destroyed.

Rules.name: Expert Weaponsmith
Rules.description: Missile weapons bought from the warband's basic equipment lists gain +3" range for pistols and +6" range for crossbows and handguns while this fighter is in the warband.

Rules.name: Runts
Rules.description: This fighter may gain experience, but if it rolls 'That Lad's got talent' it is immediately killed by its Orc overlords and removed from the roster.

Rules.name: Minderz
Rules.description: Each Cave Squig must stay within 6" of a Goblin Warrior. If not, it goes wild and moves 2D6" in a random direction each Movement phase, engaging any model it contacts.

Rules.name: Fearsome
Rules.description: A Trained Bear causes fear.

Rules.name: No Respect
Rules.description: This fighter may never become the warband leader.

Dwarf Special.name: Master of Blades
Dwarf Special.description: Successful parry if beats or matches opponent's roll. If using two parry weapons, can parry two attacks. Re-roll failed parries with two Dwarf axes.

Dwarf Special.name: Extra Tough
Dwarf Special.description: May re-roll once on the Hero's Serious Injury chart (must accept second roll).

Dwarf Special.name: Resource Hunter
Dwarf Special.description: When rolling on Exploration chart, may modify one dice roll by +1/-1.

Dwarf Special.name: True Grit
Dwarf Special.description: When rolling on Injury table, 1-3 is knocked down, 4-5 is stunned, 6 is out of action.

Dwarf Special.name: Thick Skull
Dwarf Special.description: 3+ save to avoid being stunned (2+ with helmet). Replaces normal helmet rule.

Troll Slayer.name: Ferocious Charge
Troll Slayer.description: Double attacks on charge turn, but with -1 to hit penalty.

Troll Slayer.name: Monster Slayer
Troll Slayer.description: Always wounds on 4+ regardless of Toughness (unless Strength makes it better).

Troll Slayer.name: Berserker
Troll Slayer.description: Add +1 to close combat 'to hit' rolls during the turn in which he charges.

Orc Special.name: 'ard ead
Orc Special.description: 3+ save to avoid being stunned (2+ with helmet). Treated as knocked down instead.

Orc Special.name: da cunnin' plan
Orc Special.description: Re-roll failed Rout tests (Boss only, if not OOA).

Orc Special.name: 'eadbasher
Orc Special.description: Knocked down results caused in melee count as stunned instead.

Skaven Special.name: Black Hunger
Skaven Special.description: Add +1 Attack and +D3" move for the turn, but suffer D3 S3 hits at the end.

Skaven Special.name: Tail Fighting
Skaven Special.description: Wield shield, knife, or sword with tail. Gain extra attack or +1 armor save.

Skaven Special.name: Wall Runner
Skaven Special.description: No Initiative test needed for climbing.

Skaven Special.name: Infiltration
Skaven Special.description: Placed after opposing warband, anywhere out of sight and >12" from enemy.

Skaven Special.name: Art of Silent Death
Skaven Special.description: Fight with bare paws (+1 attack). Critical hit on 5-6 to wound. Used with Fighting Claws: +2 attacks.

Mutations.name: Daemon Soul
Mutations.description: 4+ save against the effects of spells or prayers.

Mutations.name: Great Claw
Mutations.description: +1 Attack with +1 Strength bonus. May carry no weapons in this arm.

Mutations.name: Tentacle
Mutations.description: Reduce opponent's attacks by -1 (min 1). May not carry weapons in this arm.

Mutations.name: Blackblood
Mutations.description: If model loses a wound in melee, anyone in base contact suffers S3 hit.

Mutations.name: Spines
Mutations.description: Anyone in base contact suffers S1 hit at the start of each melee phase.

Mutations.name: Scorpion Tail
Mutations.description: Extra S5 attack in melee (S2 if target immune to poison).

Mutations.name: Extra Arm
Mutations.description: +1 Attack (can use weapon, shield or buckler).

Blessings of Nurgle.name: Stream of Corruption
Blessings of Nurgle.description: Shooting attack, range 6", S3, no armor saves.

Blessings of Nurgle.name: Nurgle's Rot
Blessings of Nurgle.description: Immune to poison. Passed on 6 to wound in melee. Target must pass T test or lose 1 Toughness permanently.

Sisters of Sigmar.name: Sign of Sigmar
Sisters of Sigmar.description: Possessed or Undead opponents lose their first attack in the first round (min 1).

Sisters of Sigmar.name: Protection of Sigmar
Sisters of Sigmar.description: Any spell affecting her is nullified on 4+.

Sisters of Sigmar.name: Utter Determination
Sisters of Sigmar.description: May re-roll any failed Rout tests (Matriarch only).

Sisters of Sigmar.name: Righteous Fury
Sisters of Sigmar.description: Hates all Skaven, Undead, Possessed, Beastmen, Dark Elves.

Sisters of Sigmar.name: Absolute Faith
Sisters of Sigmar.description: Re-roll any fear tests. Does not have to test if fighting alone against several opponents.
